label: Turkish
heroTitle: Ürdün genelinde dükkanları gösteren yüzen bir görünüm.
heroDescription: Kategorileri dokulu baloncuklar olarak keşfedin, ardından her dükkanın yararlı ayrıntılarını görmek için modern kartları açın.
bubbleDescription: Daha büyük kategoriler şişer ve diğerlerini iter; böylece en yoğun ticari kümeler hemen öne çıkar.
bubbleHint: Listeyi filtrelemek için bir baloncuğa dokunun.
shopBubbleHint: Baloncukları fareyle taşıyın ve detayları açmak için birine tıklayın.
chooseCategory: Dükkanları görmek için bir kategori baloncuğu seçin.
dragHint: Görünümü yeniden düzenlemek için herhangi bir baloncuğu sürükleyin.
detailsEmpty: Daha fazla bilgi görmek için bir dükkan seçin.
footerSummary: Built for fun by Zaid Sadedin, who clearly got tired of hunting for things the hard way and decided everything should be easier to find.
aboutTitle: Hi, I’m Zaid Sadedin, and yes, I made this because I wanted finding things to feel less painful.
aboutDescription: I’m a Web and Mobile Developer with hands-on experience delivering scalable, high-performance solutions across many industries. My stack includes React.js, Next.js, React Native, ASP.NET, C#, MVC, and ASP.NET Core APIs, and I enjoy turning ideas into products that feel useful, fast, and well-crafted. This little project was built for fun with one simple purpose: help people find everything easier, with less scrolling, less guessing, and fewer "where is that thing?" moments.
aboutImageAlt: Portrait of the developer who built this project
aboutProfileHeading: Full-stack delivery with a product mindset.
aboutProfileBody: Across my career, I have helped deliver more than 30 projects spanning ERP systems, fleet management, logistics and tracking, ride-hailing apps, social platforms, and government systems. That mix has taught me how to build complete end-to-end solutions instead of isolated screens or services.
aboutExperienceHeading: Web, mobile, and back-end systems that work together.
aboutExperienceBody: My day-to-day work covers modern front-end and mobile development with React.js, Next.js, and React Native, together with robust back-end work using ASP.NET, C#, MVC, and ASP.NET Core APIs. I focus on performance, maintainability, and solutions that scale cleanly as products grow.
aboutLeadershipHeading: More than code: communication, planning, and solution design.
aboutLeadershipBody: Alongside development, I have handled project management, client communication, requirements gathering, technical meetings, task assignment, and delivery planning. I work closely with stakeholders, spot gaps early, and translate business goals into practical technical execution.
aboutFocusHeading: Growing deeper in React Native while building impactful products.
aboutFocusBody: Right now, I am focused on building high-quality iOS and Android experiences with React Native while continuing to expand across modern web and back-end technologies. I am open to strong teams, meaningful products, and environments that value innovation, ownership, and quality. If it also makes life simpler and helps people find what they need faster, even better.
